metaskills.title: Source Check (Read Your Own Signal)
metaskills.oneSentence: When someone hands you a claim, look at the thing the claim is about — before you act on it.

metaskills.title: Audit the Audit (Right-Size Audit Discipline)
metaskills.oneSentence: The discipline of asking, at every multi-round audit decision point: did the audit produce more signal than ceremony, and what's the marginal-value-per-round trajectory?

metaskills.title: Operator-AI Pushback Discipline (Sycophancy Antidote)
metaskills.oneSentence: When the operator calls for speed ("ship for speed," "skip the ceremony," "operator override," "make all the smartest choices," "just do it"), dispatch does NOT agree by default — it surfaces 5 specific data points before rendering one of three honest verdicts.

metaskills.title: Use-Proof Gate (Built ≠ Shipped ≠ Used)
metaskills.oneSentence: Built ≠ deployed ≠ dogfoodable ≠ live; never claim "live/shipped/dogfoodable/working" without operator-use OR runtime proof — sycophancy class "we built it = we shipped it" is a recurring failure mode that this gate exists to catch.

pillars.name: Thinking & Reasoning
pillars.arc: From beliefs shaped by what feels true → to reliably finding what is true, even under pressure

pillars.name: Learning & Cognition
pillars.arc: From learning what's in front of you → to learning faster than the world changes

pillars.name: Body & Biological Systems
pillars.arc: From managing health reactively → to optimizing biological infrastructure proactively

pillars.name: Mind & Psychological Architecture
pillars.arc: From internal state determined by external circumstances → to stable internal architecture

pillars.name: Energy, Attention & Time
pillars.arc: From responding to whatever demands attention → to allocating three non-renewable resources with precision

pillars.name: Systems Thinking & Complexity
pillars.arc: From seeing events → to seeing systems, understanding most problems are feedback loops not incidents

pillars.name: Data, Statistics & Causal Reasoning
pillars.arc: From using data to confirm beliefs → to letting data change beliefs, never confusing correlation with causation

pillars.name: Philosophy, Ethics & First Principles
pillars.arc: From inherited values → to examined, tested, deliberately chosen ones

pillars.name: History & Pattern Recognition
pillars.arc: From experiencing everything as new → to recognizing the pattern when you've seen this before

pillars.name: Reality Testing & Direct Experience
pillars.arc: From reasoning about the world → to consistently testing reasoning against it

pillars.name: Technical Craft & Software Engineering
pillars.arc: From making things work → to making things work reliably, maintainably, and elegantly

pillars.name: AI & Intelligence Amplification
pillars.arc: From using AI tools → to designing systems where human and AI intelligence combine

pillars.name: Product & Design Thinking
pillars.arc: From building what seems useful → to deeply understanding what people actually need

pillars.name: Creative Thinking & Idea Generation
pillars.arc: From improving existing things → to generating genuinely new combinations

pillars.name: Execution & Shipping Discipline
pillars.arc: From good intentions → to a track record, the muscle of completion

pillars.name: Mastery & Craft Philosophy
pillars.arc: From building to accomplish goals → to building because quality matters intrinsically

pillars.name: Business Strategy & Market Positioning
pillars.arc: From building and hoping → to understanding where value accumulates

pillars.name: Sales, Persuasion & Conversion
pillars.arc: From explaining your value → to helping others discover it

pillars.name: Marketing, Messaging & Distribution
pillars.arc: From making things and waiting → to understanding how ideas spread

pillars.name: Financial Sovereignty & Capital
pillars.arc: From earning money → to money earning money, every decision from freedom

pillars.name: Legal, Risk & Structural Protection
pillars.arc: From hoping nothing goes wrong → to designing structures that protect what's built

pillars.name: Relationships, Trust & Deep Connection
pillars.arc: From having contacts → to having people who would do almost anything for you

pillars.name: Leadership, Culture & Direction Setting
pillars.arc: From doing the work → to creating conditions for others to do their best work

pillars.name: Teaching, Mentorship & Knowledge Multiplication
pillars.arc: From knowledge that dies with you → to understanding that multiplies through others

pillars.name: Negotiation, Conflict & Adversarial Dynamics
pillars.arc: From avoiding difficult conversations → to navigating any situation where interests diverge

pillars.name: Community & Belonging
pillars.arc: From building alone → to being embedded in communities that make you more capable

pillars.name: Sovereignty & Freedom Architecture
pillars.arc: From choices constrained by dependencies → to deliberately designed life where no single dependency holds you hostage

pillars.name: Resilience, Antifragility & Recovery
pillars.arc: From tolerating adversity → to getting stronger from it

pillars.name: Behavioral Architecture & Environment Design
pillars.arc: From relying on willpower → to designing systems that produce desired behavior reliably

pillars.name: Identity, Values & Self-Knowledge
pillars.arc: From identity inherited from roles → to knowing who you are independent of any of those things
